---
name: plc-sequence-analysis
description: Analyze PLC sequence logic, interlocks, alarms, mode transitions, timers, counters and recovery behavior. Use when prompts involve PLC, sequence, ladder, ST, interlock, alarm, HSC or mode switching.
user-invocable: false
---
# PLC Sequence Analysis

1. Enumerate modes, states, transitions and abnormal branches.
2. List permissives, inhibits, alarms and reset conditions.
3. Derive positive, negative and recovery test cases.
4. Check power-loss recovery, retentive data and startup defaults.
5. Output exact tags/signals, expected transitions, timing windows and evidence needs.
